title: Finite Line Search Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite line-search bad Armijo, bad descent-direction, and bad accepted-candidate QF_LRA/Farkas regression seeds
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact derivative replay computes directional derivative -4 for direction -2, so the malformed nonnegative-directional-derivative row is inconsistent; exact Armijo replay computes violation 1 for trial step alpha=1, so the malformed nonpositive-violation row is inconsistent; exact backtracking replay computes accepted_x = 0 for alpha=1/2, so the malformed accepted-candidate row claiming x=1/4 is contradictory.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional line-search rows only when they add distinct Wolfe, exact line minimization, projected-step, stochastic, or convergence pressure; keep general line-search termination and rates in horizon lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite line-search witnesses as deterministic exact-rational replay rows.
Replay derivatives, descent directions, trial candidates, Armijo right-hand sides, rejected-step violations, accepted-step slack, and backtracking factors over exact rationals.
Route false descent-direction, Armijo acceptance, and accepted-candidate claims through checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence after replay computes the offending exact-rational conflict.
Keep general termination, Wolfe conditions, convergence rates, stochastic variants, and floating-point stability claims marked Lean-horizon until proof artifacts exist.
